# 717REC

> Lancaster PA's premier recreational cornhole league — standings, schedules, team rankings, and playoff brackets.

717REC organizes recreational cornhole competition across Competitive, Intermediate, and Recreational divisions. The site publishes weekly standings, match schedules, power-score rankings, head-to-head records, and live playoff brackets.

## Pages

- [Home](/): League overview and current season highlights.
- [Teams](/teams): Roster of all teams across every division.
- [Schedule](/schedule): Upcoming and recent match schedule.
- [Standings](/stats): Current standings, power scores, and rankings.
- [Playoffs](/playoffs): Live and historical playoff brackets.
- [History](/history): Past seasons, champions, and final standings.
- [Insights](/insights): League-wide stats, parity, and top performers.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of any two teams.
- [Help](/help): How standings, schedules, playoffs, and power scores work.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the league administrators.

## Optional

- [Message Board](/message-board): Community discussion among league members.
